title: Create: Simulated Thrusters
description: Thruster blocks that generate lift and propulsion for Create: Aeronautics contraptions without moving parts.
body:
# Create: Simulated Thrusters

Adds thruster blocks for Create: Aeronautics aircraft.

## Thrusters

### Redstone Thruster

A kinetic thruster powered by rotational force and toggled with a redstone signal. Output scales with the redstone power level. Requires stress units like any Create machine.

### Blaze Thruster

A fueled thruster that burns blaze fuel to produce thrust. Fuel grade affects output:

- Low grade
- Standard
- Superheated

## Config

A common config file is generated at `config/create_simulated_thrusters-common.toml`. Available options:

- `redstoneThrusterThrust` - Maximum thrust of the redstone thruster at full power and speed.
- `redstoneThrusterAirflow` - Maximum airflow of the redstone thruster at full power and speed.
- `redstoneThrusterMaxThrustRpm` - Kinetic speed in RPM where the redstone thruster reaches full thrust.
- `blazeThrusterLowThrust` - Thrust on low-grade fuel (sticks etc.).
- `blazeThrusterHighThrust` - Thrust on standard fuel (coal, logs etc.).
- `blazeThrusterBlueThrust` - Thrust on superheated fuel (blaze cake).
